title: Provide ability to move an item to a group based on a date in a formula column and/or a Creation Log
excerpt: Provide ability to move an item to a group based on a date generated in a formula column and/or a Creation Log instead of having to use just a date column.

posts.author: jpnelson (Jana Nelson)
posts.cookedHtml: Provide ability to move an item to a group based on a date generated in a formula column and/or a Creation Log instead of having to use just a date column.
